doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The core statute (735 ILCS 5/9-209) and 5-day notice rule are real, but specific details such as the "age of 13" substitute-service threshold, the email-service carve-out, and the 7-day summons rule could not be verified as accurate enacted

| **Email service carve-out language** | ⚠️ Plausible but not confirmed as enacted text |
| **7-day summons return-date rule** | ⚠️ Not independently verified against current statute |
| **"Conformed text effective 2024" label** | ⚠️ Not a standard Illinois legislative publication format |
